Title: Orienter Prop
Description:
Locates valid positions and orients the child Prop accordingly.
Automatically checks the Pattern in different rotations and rotates the child Prop accordingly.

Options.Label: SelectionMode
Options.Description:
FirstValid | AllValid | RandomValid
Determines which valid rotation is generated:
- FirstValid: The first valid rotation in the Rotations list.
- AllValid: All valid rotations in the Rotations list.
- RandomValid: Picks one of the valid Rotations at random.

Options.Label: Seed
Options.Description: Determines which position is picked if RandomValid.

Outputs.Label: Prop
Outputs.Description: Prop to place at valid positions.

Outputs.Label: Pattern
Outputs.Description: Defines what valid locations look like.

Outputs.Label: Scanner
Outputs.Description: Scans relative to the anchor for valid locations.
